name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit positions as a data-science-led CX transformation group, leveraging its Profusion (AI/ML, data science) and Amplify Analytix capabilities to deliver GenAI-powered experience intelligence. Their methodology centers on operationalizing customer data into predictive insight models, with a delivery model spanning EU and India. Thought leadership themes focus on the convergence of AI, data engineering, and experience design for enterprise clients in banking and retail.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta's methodology is uniquely anchored in SAP-native experience management, embedding Qualtrics XM directly into SAP workflows and dashboards. Their AI stance emphasizes operational analytics within the SAP ecosystem rather than standalone AI products. Delivery model is DACH-centric with expanding EU reach, and thought leadership themes consistently address the intersection of operational data (O-data) and experience data (X-data) within enterprise SAP environments.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics specializes in public sector and government CX transformation, leveraging Qualtrics as their core platform for citizen experience measurement and maturity assessment. Their methodology emphasizes CX maturity frameworks tailored to GCC institutional contexts, with a delivery model spanning Saudi Arabia, UAE, and broader Middle East. Thought leadership centers on national-level CX strategies, government digital transformation, and citizen journey measurement.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX operates as the experience arm of a global research powerhouse, blending traditional market research rigor with Medallia-powered digital CX measurement. Their methodology emphasizes loyalty science, experience ROI modeling, and behavioral segmentation at scale. Delivery is fully global with deep sector expertise in financial services and retail. Thought leadership themes revolve around customer loyalty drivers, CX-to-financial-performance linkage, and the evolution of experience measurement methodologies.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a Qualtrics Platinum Partner focused on enterprise XM program design, implementation, and optimization across the full Qualtrics suite. Their methodology emphasizes programmatic XM maturity — building scalable VoC, VoE, and digital experience programs rather than one-off deployments. AI stance is Qualtrics-native, leveraging platform AI features (Text iQ, Stats iQ, Predict iQ) rather than proprietary models. Thought leadership consistently addresses Qualtrics implementation best practices, program governance, and XM ROI for mid-to-large enterprises.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in experience management program design and implementation for European enterprises. Their methodology focuses on practical XM deployment — survey design, dashboard configuration, and program governance within the Qualtrics ecosystem. Content output has been minimal in recent months, suggesting either a shift to direct sales engagement or resource constraints on thought leadership production.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap positions as a human-centered CX and EX consultancy with deep expertise in journey mapping, employee experience design, and organizational culture transformation. Their methodology blends qualitative journey research with quantitative measurement, emphasizing the employee-customer experience linkage. Delivery model spans Iberia and Latin America with particular strength in banking and insurance sectors. Thought leadership themes consistently address VoE, hybrid work experience design, and cultural transformation as CX enablers.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is the largest Spanish-language CX consultancy, combining Qualtrics platform expertise with proprietary CX strategy frameworks across 15+ countries. Their methodology emphasizes Best Customer Experience (BCX) benchmarking, VoC program architecture, and digital experience design. AI stance leverages Qualtrics-native capabilities augmented with their own analytical frameworks. Thought leadership spans CX strategy, customer journey optimization, and experience governance for enterprise clients in banking, telecom, and retail across Latin America and Iberia.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant's Connected Experiences Studio operates within a massive global technology services company, positioning CX as one pillar of broader digital transformation engagements. Their methodology integrates design thinking, data engineering, and AI-powered personalization into enterprise-scale digital experience platforms. Delivery model is global with significant engineering resources in Latin America. CX thought leadership is diluted within Globant's broader AI and digital transformation narrative, making it less visible as a standalone CX competitor.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No verifiable digital presence found. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model. This competitor may operate through word-of-mouth referrals, private networks, or may have been acquired/dissolved.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No verifiable digital presence found. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model. This competitor may operate as a niche boutique through direct referrals or private networks.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No verifiable digital presence found. Unable to assess methodology, AI stance, or delivery model. May be a nascent consultancy or operating under a different brand name in the Qualtrics ecosystem.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics implementation partner with demonstrated enterprise case studies across technology (CrowdStrike), aviation (WestJet), and gaming/public sector (OLG). Their delivery model appears focused on mid-to-large enterprise Qualtrics deployments with emphasis on program design and platform optimization. Thought leadership output is minimal — they appear to rely primarily on the Qualtrics partner ecosystem and direct sales channels rather than content marketing.
